source_wording.exact_independence_scope: Internal non-forcing within the declared source model; no claim of premise-independent evidential replication.

classification.rationale: The typed receiving classification preserves the source's model-relative scope and explicitly carries the shared construction premise.

nonclaims: This assessment does not convert two methods into two independent evidential units.
This assessment does not upgrade the source claim status.
falsifiers: The copied source wording differs from the frozen packet.
The classification requires a stronger independence type than the source supplied.
